gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, where event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; additionally, tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders while dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; furthermore, career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; additionally, tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; additionally, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, while students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, amidst dozens of booths with colorful banners circling the polished floor, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, while alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; additionally, healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, with students clutching resumes inside branded folders, while alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
